emails.subject: Sierra Pacific
emails.body: Hi Jane, According to my contact at Sierra Pacific/Nevada Power, the deals you're doing with them should be with Nevada Power not Sierra Pacific. For Sept, the deal #s I see are 737918, 796406,and 1043833. Is there any reason why we can't change the counterparty name in Sitara to Nevada Power? Thanks Darla Saucier x3-4561

emails.subject: RE: Sierra Pacific
emails.body: RE: Sierra Pacific I have not done any deals with Sierra Pacific but will pass on to Steve South. To: Tholt, Jane M.

emails.subject: RE: Sierra Pacific
emails.body: Thanks, I saw your name in Sitara. Sorry for the mix up. To: Saucier, Darla
